Now, code for helper function:

public long[] toFraction(String s) {

   // parse s into integer_part, decimal_non_repeating, decimal_repeating.

   String[] integerDecimal = s.split("\\.", 2);

   String integerPart = integerDecimal[0];

   String decimalPart = integerDecimal.length > 1 ? integerDecimal[1] : "";

   String decimalNonRepeating = "";

   String decimalRepeating = "";

   if (decimalPart.contains("(")) {

       // split into non-repeating and repeating

       int idx = decimalPart.indexOf('(');

       decimalNonRepeating = decimalPart.substring(0, idx);

       decimalRepeating = decimalPart.substring(idx+1, decimalPart.length()-1);

   } else {

       decimalNonRepeating = decimalPart;

       decimalRepeating = "";

   }

   // Now compute the integer part as a number.

   long integerNum = Long.parseLong(integerPart);

   // Now compute the decimal part.

   long decimalNum = 0;

   long decimalDen = 1;

   if (decimalRepeating.isEmpty()) {

       // no repeating part.

       if (decimalNonRepeating.isEmpty()) {

           // decimal part is 0. So decimalNum is 0, decimalDen is 1.

           decimalNum = 0;

           decimalDen = 1;

       } else {

           // decimal part is decimalNonRepeating / 10^d, where d is length.

           long d = decimalNonRepeating.length();

           long den = (long) Math.pow(10, d);

           long num = Long.parseLong(decimalNonRepeating);

           decimalNum = num;

           decimalDen = den;

       }

   } else {

       // has repeating part.

       long n = decimalNonRepeating.length();

       long m = decimalRepeating.length();

       String concat = decimalNonRepeating + decimalRepeating;

       long concatNum = Long.parseLong(concat);

       long nonRepeatingNum = decimalNonRepeating.isEmpty() ? 0 : Long.parseLong(decimalNonRepeating);

       long numeratorDecimal = concatNum - nonRepeatingNum;

       long denominatorDecimal = (long)(Math.pow(10, n) * (Math.pow(10, m) - 1));

       decimalNum = numeratorDecimal;

       decimalDen = denominatorDecimal;

   }

   // total is integerNum + decimalNum / decimalDen = (integerNum * decimalDen + decimalNum) / decimalDen

   long totalNum = integerNum * decimalDen + decimalNum;

   long totalDen = decimalDen;

   return new long[] {totalNum, totalDen};

}

Wait, but in the case where there is no decimal part (decimalPart is empty), then decimalNum is 0, decimalDen is 1. So total is integerNum + 0 → integerNum * 1 + 0 → totalNum is integerNum * 1 + 0 → which is handled by the code.

public boolean isRationalEqual(String s, String t) {

   long[] s_frac = toFraction(s);

   long[] t_frac = toFraction(t);

   return s_frac[0] * t_frac[1] == s_frac[1] * t_frac[0];

}
